# Copilot Instructions

Follow the repository rules in `AGENTS.md`.

This repository is only for dumping and formatting empreendimento Power BI data. Keep suggestions scoped to:

- `scripts/dump-dashboard-data.js`
- `scripts/format-dashboard-data.js`
- `README.md`
- agent instruction files

Do not suggest restoring removed API server or Playwright capture scripts unless the user explicitly asks.
